notes: Direct WebFetch to all vendor blogs, YouTube RSS feeds and HN Algolia API returned 403 at the proxy layer today (consistent with known cloud-sandbox behavior) — WebSearch was the sole discovery channel for the entire run. That's >1/3 of configured sources blocked at the transport level; treated as expected environment degradation, not a silent-day signal, per the discovery results above. Expert-content minimum (5) was not met (3 published: 2 articles + 1 video) — video discovery was hit hardest since RSS and yt-dlp were both blocked, and several plausible candidate videos could not be confidently attributed to a configured channel via WebSearch alone, so they were left out rather than risked.
